items.title: Refactor Add to Attio sheet to diff-based UI
items.description: Refactor the popup sheet UI to remove redundant sections/buttons, introduce field-level diffing with per-field Update/Skip, improve user-friendly errors while preserve debug detail, and align copy/i18n + TypeScript types with project standards.

items.title: Add LOADING state icon for profile check in progress
items.description: When the extension is checking if a person exists in Attio (during page load or tab switch), show a person silhouette icon without any status indicator instead of the default plus icon. This provides better visual feedback while the state is being determined.

items.title: Make review UI compact with progressive disclosure
items.description: Replace bulky card-based diff rows with a compact, progressive disclosure UI. Initially shows a collapsed header like '3 fields with updates ▼', clicking expands to show field details with Update/Skip buttons. Keeps functionality but improves elegance and space usage.
